description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and image_build. In the test stage add a devkit_test_module job that uses the custom image registry.gitlab.com/web3-sh/devkit with entrypoint /bin/bash -c and runs the script commands: git clone https://gitlab.com/space-sh/space.git; cd space && ./space /install/ && cd ..; which bash; which busybox; which space; bash --version; space -V; cd /home/devkit && nohup bash ./tools/geth.sh &; cd $CI_PROJECT_DIR && bash ./test/run_tests.sh. In the image_build stage add a docker_image_build job that uses the docker:git image with a docker:dind service, runs only on tag pipelines, and executes: IMAGE_VERSION=$(grep "Space v1:" space-module.txt | cut -d':' -f2 | cut -d" " -f2); docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY; docker build --build-arg VERSION=$IMAGE_VERSION -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_VERSION .; docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_VERSION; docker tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_VERSION $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest; docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest. The pipeline relies on CI variables $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE, $CI_BUILD_TOKEN and $CI_REGISTRY for authentication and does not define caches or artifacts.
